zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater於大約1458年出生在蘇格蘭班福爾班福時，她的父親Walter Ogilvy 1st of Deskford and Findlater54歲，母親Lady Margaretha Sinclair of Deskford49歲。她和Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromarty至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1505年在英國蘇格蘭洛-爾享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater于大约1458年出生在苏格兰班福爾班福时，她的父亲Walter Ogilvy 1st of Deskford and Findlater54岁，母亲Lady Margaretha Sinclair of Deskford49岁。她和Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromarty至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1505年在英国苏格兰洛-爾享年48岁。

variants.name: Ogilvie
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Oglesby  , a habitational name from the barony of Ogilvie in Glamis (Angus), whose name is probably Pictish, of uncertain origin and meaning.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater was born about 1458, in Banff, Banffshire, Scotland, her father, Walter Ogilvy 1st of Deskford and Findlater, was 54 and her mother, Lady Margaretha Sinclair of Deskford, was 49. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromarty. She died in 1505, in Ross-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater est née environ 1458, à Banff, Banffshire, Écosse, son père, Walter Ogilvy 1st of Deskford and Findlater, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaretha Sinclair of Deskford, avait 49 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromarty. Elle est décédée en 1505, à Ross-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland: Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater um 1458 in Banff, Banffshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter Ogilvy 1st of Deskford and Findlater 54 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaretha Sinclair of Deskford 49. Sie hatte mit Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromarty mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1505 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Ross-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater è nata il circa 1458 nel Banff, Banffshire, Scotland, sua padre, Walter Ogilvy 1st of Deskford and Findlater, aveva 54 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaretha Sinclair of Deskford, aveva 49 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromarty. Morì nel 1505, nel Ross-shire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlaterが約1458年にスコットランドバンフシュアイアバンッフで生まれた時，父Walter Ogilvy 1st of Deskford and Findlaterは54歳，母Lady Margaretha Sinclair of Deskfordは49歳であった。彼女はAlexander Urquhart 6th of Cromartyとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1505年にイギリススコットランドロス-シュアイアで48歳で死去した。

ko.Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 크로마티
ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater(이)가 대략 1458년 스컷랜드 반프실르 반프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Ogilvy 1st of Deskford and Findlater(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaretha Sinclair of Deskford(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromarty(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1505년 영국 스코틀랜드 로스-실르에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland: кромерти, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater родилась около 1458 г. в местности банфф, банффшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Walter Ogilvy 1st of Deskford and Findlater было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaretha Sinclair of Deskford, 49. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromarty. Она умерла в 1505 г. в местности росс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromarty. Murió en 1505, en Ross-shire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años.
